description_long: This mobile phone features a large, flat rectangular touchscreen with a vibrant, high-resolution image displayed on the front. The image appears to be an anime-style illustration of a person with spiky dark hair and a yellow backpack, walking through an urban environment with buildings and a blue sky. The phone has a slim profile with rounded corners and a thin, red bezel that frames the display. No physical buttons, camera modules, or brand logos are visible on any side, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The back and sides are not visible, but the overall design suggests a focus on the display as the primary interface. The phone's surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of contemporary smartphones.
description: A slim, modern mobile phone with a large, glossy touchscreen displaying an anime-style urban scene and a red bezel. The design is minimalist, with no visible buttons or logos.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full display with the anime-style illustration and the red bezel clearly visible.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the phone's slim profile and the red edge, with the display image visible along the length.
description_view_2: The rearward view shows the display from the opposite end, with the image upside down and the red bezel still prominent.
description_view_3: The other side view highlights the thinness and the continuous red border, with the display image partially visible.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays an anime-style illustration of a person with spiky dark hair and a yellow backpack walking through a city street with buildings and a blue sky. No icons, widgets, or interface elements are visible.
